title: Chapter 37
content:
Chapter 37

Smack!

Smack!

"Han~"

"Hmmg~"

"Hoonngh~~"

Sandra moaned with each movement of my waist, and I had to keep her in place because she was slipping back bit by bit.

But, three minutes into it, and a total of seven minutes had passed, it was time to get serious for the last four minutes.

I grabbed her tits and instead of fondling them, I grabbed her nipples between my thumbs and index fingers and gave them a gentle but strong pull.

"HAAAN~~~~!!!"

A loud moan once again left her mouth. I began to pull and fondle her nipples at the same time as I drilled as deeply inside her as I could.

Pinch...

"HNG~~~"

Sandra tried to back away, but no matter how hard she tried, her body couldn't move. Even if she was unfamiliar with the strange sensation of pleasure, her body could feel it and determined it as pleasure, so there was her innate desire to feel joy on the table, which made her protests useless as her body didn't want to move away from it.

"Jack! My pussy! somethi-- Something is wron---unnnhh!!!"

One thing I had to admire was her quick learning ability. She called my dick a dick and her pussy a pussy, nothing else. Of course, the requirement was to only do that while we were having sex, so to her, it was sort of like assigning names.

Anyway, the way her pussy was tightening around my dick, she was very close to cumming. She wasn't the only one, however, as I was reaching the edge as well, but not at her pace. I still had two minutes left on the clock, and I could go easily for that time, but she wouldn't last thirty seconds more under this relentless assault.

But depriving her of her orgasm just because I didn't want to waste two minutes was just too cruel to her. So, I picked up speed and soon enough, I arrived at the edge along with her. In about ten seconds, she was about to scream loudly when...

Mmph!!!!

I plastered my lips against hers and inserted my tongue in an instant to latch it with hers. As I did, I began to erupt as well.

"Ungh!!!"

I groaned as I came inside of her and just as two of my spurts passed, the grip on my dick tightened to the point it ached a bit as well and Sandra erupted on my dick. It wasn't a squirt, but it sure was a lot.

I lodged myself deep inside of her, my hands still pinching her nipples terribly while my lips were mashed into her. Our connected waists trembled as my sensitive head was stimulated inside of her pussy as she clamped down on me tightly as she and I both came.

"HNNGGHHN!!!"

She moaned in my mouth with such ferocity that I barely managed to get my tongue out of her mouth before she clamped it shut as her whole body convulsed.

Her orgasm soon passed; however, it didn't take me long to realize. Her convulsion wasn't just because she was cumming. Her aura core. It was upgrading.

"What the..." I didn't know what was happening, but forgetting about my lust in an instant, I ended the state of completion so I could consume a mana potion, and as I did, my mana recovered in an instant.

I invaded her body with my mana and began to focus it on her aura core. It wasn't long before I found her aura core, and I began to supply my pure mana to it to stabilize it. Given the purity of my mana, it wasn't that difficult to stabilize her core and let it build with my own mana.

As my mana converted to aura when it entered her aura core, it wasn't long before she stabilized as her core solidified as well. It wasn't a difficult task, but the control had to be perfect, and my control was perfect.

"Haa... Haa..."

Finally, she calmed down and took deep, deep breaths. It took her a while to calm down, and when she did, all she said was...

"Haa... I-I knew it."

I didn't know what, but I had an idea now. She asked me something when I came in her yesterday, but I couldn't quite understand. However, a previous conversation with her reminded me that the state of completion somehow turned my dick into a mana spewing gun for a set duration of time.

That pure mana that entered also replenished her aura the other day, and now, it enhanced her aura core to the point she entered the two-star realm. She must have already been closed, and my pure mana enhanced the process by a good bit.

"Haa..." I couldn't help but sigh. It was sure going to be a headache.

~~

"For now, let's just do this every day and see if it really is because of you or not." With that, we ended our bath session, and Sandra left to train on her own. She was quite excited about rising in the ranks. I asked her to remain silent about this just in case. Those in power didn't like it if someone who didn't obey them got stronger.

I, on the other hand, left for the library that was in the merchant's district. Now that I was awakened, no one stopped me. I arrived at the library and entered. This time, a woman, and quite a beautiful one at that, came to tend to me, but looking at my clothes, she scrunched her face.

Well, I was obviously a commoner from my clothes, so there was no reason to tend to me, but if I was here, then I was an awakener, so she politely asked, "Please show me your awakener license."

Although there was no need to, I decided not to create a scene like a cranky middle aged bitch and showed her my license. When she saw my rank, which was C, just one rank lower than the lord of this city, her demeanor was quick to change.

Still, the matter of money remained, but when I gave her a silver coin, her attitude once again changed very quickly.

To be honest, while the woman was beautiful, she wasn't bountiful, and since my lust was satiated at the moment, I decided not to play with her. A commoner putting his hand on someone of a higher status wasn't a wise idea. It was still that kind of an era. Even earlier today, when the noble lord was here. While his wife and daughter were amazing to look at, I didn't look at them for long because even that could have been enough to have me hanged.

How dare a commoner sully the prime nobles with his gaze? I had seen many killed for no reason at the hands of the nobles, to know this world wasn't so forgiving.

So, for the time being, until my status was elevated to that of a squire, I wasn't making any moves that could get me in trouble.

With that in mind, I began to check all the books I could for three silver. I mostly stuck to the history of the current kingdom I was in and this city. I could only buy ten books for one silver, with there being a time limit of one hour. Even if I managed to finish ten books in one hour, they wouldn't give me more.

Anyways, I wasn't here to waste time, so I purchased thirty books with three silver, which was enough for our household for a month. My focus was childbirth, the history of this town, and the lord, but there was nothing on him, so I stuck to the barons and the king, or in this instance, the royal family.

While the barons could keep changing due to a number of reasons, the royal family would be very difficult to change. The information on them was only about their accomplishments, so I managed to glean a rough idea from it.

I only gave the data a cursory glance for now and kept compiling it into the glossary. While I managed to glean the rough idea of the kingdom, there was no information about the baby making. There was information about it, but not the actual process.

Once I was done in about ten minutes, I stood up and left. The woman looked at me in annoyance, but considering I had just spent three silvers, three minutes for tainting the library wasn't a bad deal.

I returned home and went straight to my room. The siblings weren't at home, and Rayla and Julian were busy with the housework.
